assertions.assertion: Calls AddLocalApiAuthentication() to set up local API authentication
Mentions that clients must include 'IdentityServerApi' in their AllowedScopes
assertions.rationale: Explicit section explains clients must include 'IdentityServerApi' in AllowedScopes with code example.

assertions.assertion: Warns that local API authentication only works when the API is co-hosted with IdentityServer, not for separate API hosts
assertions.rationale: Explicit warning section at the end states this only works when co-hosted.
